description: Balanced institutional resilience across legitimacy capacity flexibility coordination learning accountability equity and implementation burden.
Prioritizes trust fairness transparency public consent and perceived legitimacy.
Prioritizes administrative capacity staffing expertise finance data and implementation.
Prioritizes adaptive rules discretion experimentation and policy revision under uncertainty.
Prioritizes interagency cross-sector and multi-level coordination.
Prioritizes evaluation institutional memory after-action implementation and reform.
Prioritizes rights protection access justice participation and unequal-burden reduction.
Penalizes strategies with higher implementation burden when administrative fiscal or political capacity is constrained.
